ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.en: TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS LLC is a modern industrial enterprise founded in 2017, engaged in blank-stock production, metal structures, sandwich panels, as well as granite and marble slabs for the industrial and residential construction, public buildings and structures sectors.
ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.uz: «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» MChJ — 2017-yilda tashkil etilgan zamonaviy sanoat korxonasi bo'lib, sanoat va turar-joy qurilishi, jamoat binolari va inshootlari tarmoqlari uchun zagotovka ishlab chiqarish, metall konstruksiyalar, sendvich-panellar, shuningdek granit va marmar plitalar ishlab chiqarish bilan shug'ullanadi.

ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.en:
TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS LLC is a modern industrial enterprise founded in 2017, engaged in blank-stock production, metal structures, sandwich panels, as well as granite and marble slabs for the industrial and residential construction, public buildings and structures sectors.

The enterprise has a modern production line from Dai San Industrial Co. Ltd (South Korea) on an area of 4500 m². Production capacity is over 1 million m² of roofing and wall sandwich panels with mineral wool insulation per year.
ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.uz:
«TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» MChJ — 2017-yilda tashkil etilgan zamonaviy sanoat korxonasi bo'lib, sanoat va turar-joy qurilishi, jamoat binolari va inshootlari tarmoqlari uchun zagotovka ishlab chiqarish, metall konstruksiyalar, sendvich-panellar, shuningdek granit va marmar plitalar ishlab chiqarish bilan shug'ullanadi.

Korxona 4500 m² maydonda Dai San Industrial Co. Ltd (Janubiy Koreya) kompaniyasining zamonaviy texnologik liniyasiga ega. Ishlab chiqarish quvvati — yiliga 1 mln m² dan ortiq mineral paxtadan issiqlik izolyatsiyali tom yopish va devor uchun sendvich-panellar.

ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.en: TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS LLC is a modern industrial enterprise founded in 2017. Blank-stock production, metal structures, sandwich panels, as well as granite and marble slabs for industrial and residential construction.
ООО «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» — совре.uz: «TASHKENT PROFNASTIL SERVIS» MChJ — 2017-yilda tashkil etilgan zamonaviy sanoat korxonasi. Zagotovka ishlab chiqarish, metall konstruksiyalar, sendvich-panellar, shuningdek sanoat va turar-joy qurilishi uchun granit va marmar plitalar.

Оставьте заявку — подберём продукцию под.en: Submit a request — we'll select products for your project and calculate the price with delivery across Uzbekistan.
Оставьте заявку — подберём продукцию под.uz: Buyurtma qoldiring — loyihangizga mos mahsulotni tanlaymiz va O'zbekiston bo'ylab yetkazib berish bilan narxni hisoblab beramiz.

Панели изготавливаются непрерывным спосо.en: The panels are manufactured continuously on an automated line that ensures full control over production and consistently high quality. The process is managed by a computer processor in real time, minimizing the human factor.
Панели изготавливаются непрерывным спосо.uz: Panellar ishlab chiqarish ustidan to'liq nazoratni va barqaror yuqori sifatni ta'minlaydigan avtomatik liniyada uzluksiz usulda ishlab chiqariladi. Boshqaruv real vaqt rejimida kompyuter protsessori orqali amalga oshiriladi, bu esa inson omilini minimumga keltiradi.

Панели изготавливаются непрерывным спосо.en: The panels are manufactured continuously on an automated line that ensures full control over production and consistently high quality. The process is managed by a modern computer processor in real time.
Панели изготавливаются непрерывным спосо.uz: Panellar ishlab chiqarish ustidan to'liq nazoratni va barqaror yuqori sifatni ta'minlaydigan avtomatik liniyada uzluksiz usulda ishlab chiqariladi. Boshqaruv real vaqt rejimida zamonaviy kompyuter protsessori orqali amalga oshiriladi.

Предприятие располагает современной техн.en: The plant is equipped with a modern production line from Dai San Industrial Co. Ltd (South Korea) on 4500 m². Production capacity is over 1 million m² of roofing and wall sandwich panels with mineral wool insulation per year.
Предприятие располагает современной техн.uz: Korxona 4500 m² maydonda Dai San Industrial Co. Ltd (Janubiy Koreya) kompaniyasining zamonaviy texnologik liniyasiga ega. Ishlab chiqarish quvvati — yiliga 1 mln m² dan ortiq mineral paxtadan issiqlik izolyatsiyali tom yopish uchun va devor uchun sendvich-panellar.
